form.formComment: Latest effort finished 6th over 350m at this track beaten 2.25 lengths (20.07) behind Mia Sienna in a Grade 5 on April 3. Better than the last couple of runs suggest. Expected to do much better.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Latest effort finished 6th over 350m at this track beaten 2.25 lengths (20.07) behind Mia Sienna in a Grade 5 on April 3. Better than the last couple of runs suggest. Expected to do much better.

form.formComment: Solid performance after racing just off the speed to win by half a length at Warragul over 460m (26.10) beating Paw Hazelton in Restricted WIN on March 31. Expected to measure up again.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Solid performance after racing just off the speed to win by half a length at Warragul over 460m (26.10) beating Paw Hazelton in Restricted WIN on March 31. Expected to measure up again.

form.formComment: Hit the frame latest (19.56) when third at this track in a Grade 5. Yet to miss the placings in four runs from this box, including two wins. Has ability and should feature.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Hit the frame latest (19.56) when third at this track in a Grade 5. Yet to miss the placings in four runs from this box, including two wins. Has ability and should feature.

form.formComment: Was out of the placings last time at Shepparton but prior to that had been racing consistently, notching three minors in a row. Awkwardly drawn and looks tested this line up.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Was out of the placings last time at Shepparton but prior to that had been racing consistently, notching three minors in a row. Awkwardly drawn and looks tested this line up.

form.formComment: Charged out of the boxes with a strong early split and went straight to the front, scoring an all the way win (22.47) over 390m at Shepparton. Can go well again with the right run.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Charged out of the boxes with a strong early split and went straight to the front, scoring an all the way win (22.47) over 390m at Shepparton. Can go well again with the right run.

form.formComment: Has been out of the money of late. Could only manage fourth last time out over 400m at Warragul. This will test.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Has been out of the money of late. Could only manage fourth last time out over 400m at Warragul. This will test.

form.formComment: Didn't make the placings last time at this track (20.03) in a Grade 5, finishing a 5.5 lengths fifth. Goes well out of this box with a win and eight minors. Has ability and should be around the money.

form.formComment: At the last start finished 6th on March 31 over 425m at Bendigo behind Lethal Force beaten 5 lengths (24.64) in a Special conditions H. Solid claims this line-up.
